name: Knights of Avarice
description: Wealthy followers of Mammon. Gilded armour, coin hammers, no crude weapons. Every model must be worth 80+ ducats.
add_rules: Corrupt Merchants: At creation, buy 1 item from New Antioch Armoury + 1 from Iron Sultanate Armoury. Stipulations still apply. Can repurchase if lost.
Gas Bombs: Artillery Witches replace Infernal Bombs with Gas Bombs (-1 INJ DICE, BLAST 3", GAS, IGNORE ARMOUR, IGNORE COVER, IGNORE ELEVATED, IGNORE LONG RANGE, RELOAD, SCATTER).
Goetic Warlocks: Can include up to 2 Goetic Warlocks as Mercenaries. First costs 110D instead of Glory.
Infernal Rivalry: Cannot include Death Commandos (Mammon rivals Beleth, patron of Death Commandos).
Mammon's Chosen: No model (except Wretched) can cost less than 80D including all Battlekit.
Preserve the Loot: Cannot have Battlekit with FIRE or SHRAPNEL keywords. Grenade Launchers replace SHRAPNEL with -1 INJURY DICE, GAS, IGNORE ARMOUR.
Price of Greed: Heretic Priest replaces Puppet Master with Price of Greed ACTION (Risky — Injury Roll on enemy within 12" LoS, +1 INJ DICE on Crit, +1 INJ DICE per -1 INJ MOD on target).
Worship Mammon: Patron is always Mammon.

Heretic Priest.add: Price of Greed ACTION: Risky — pick target within 12". Roll Injury adding +1 DICE per point of target's armour.
